    def eligible_for_pregnancy_support(self) -> bool:
        eligible_genders = {'female', 'transgender', 'non-binary', 'gender neutral'}
        eligible_ages = range(18, 46)
        
        return (self.gender in eligible_genders and 
                self.age in eligible_ages and 
                self.monthly_income < 2500 and 
                self.family_size >= 2)
